The Application

This is the real software

No stock photography, no placeholders — every panel below is captured directly from AETHEL.

Dashboard

Net P&L, win rate, profit factor, and equity curve — every core metric in one view.

Risk Calculator

Size every position correctly before you enter — risk-reward targets calculated instantly.

Analytics — Full View

The complete analytics suite — scroll to explore portfolio expectancy, winners & losers breakdown, summary stats, and the 100-trade capital growth projection.

AI Chart Analysis

Live charting with automated technical reads — trend, support, resistance, and pattern detection.

Import CSV

Drag in a broker export — Rakuten, Interactive Brokers, Bybit, Robinhood, and more — done in seconds.

Elite Briefing

A personalized session-opening briefing built entirely from your own trading history — no cloud, no API.

The Login Experience

Start every session with your Elite Briefing

Every login opens with a personalized market journal briefing, generated from your own trading history. It's the first thing you see — a quiet, honest read on where you stand before the bell.

  • Recent performance
  • Risk habits
  • Discipline trends
  • Holding behavior
  • Consistency
  • Profitability
  • Winning streaks
  • Losing streaks

Beyond the Journal

It identifies patterns. You execute better.

AETHEL isn't just a place to log trades — it tracks consistency, measures execution quality, and surfaces the professional statistics that actually predict long-term results.

  • Calculates profit factor, expectancy, and R-multiple automatically
  • Highlights behavioral strengths and weaknesses over time
  • Updates automatically as new trades are logged or imported
Everything Included

A complete trading workflow

From pre-market preparation to post-trade review — one professional environment.

Private By Design

Your trading data stays on your computer

AETHEL is local-first software. There's no cloud database standing between you and your own performance history.

Local storage

Trades, profiles, and analytics are stored on your hard drive — not uploaded unless you explicitly enable sync.

Read-only by design

AETHEL has no execution capabilities — it analyzes your history, it never places trades on your behalf.

Fast local processing

No round-trips to a server. Importing, calculating, and rendering all happen on your machine.

API keys stay local

Any keys configured for imports or market data live on your machine and are never logged or transmitted.

Desktop-native

A real desktop application — not a browser tab. Built for the speed a trading session demands.

No account walls

Once activated, AETHEL works without requiring you to stay signed in to a remote account.

Complete license & documentation

AETHEL ships with a full professional license agreement, feature guide, privacy framework, and usage documentation — everything you need to understand exactly what you're running and how it treats your data.
